source: NvChad - NvChad UI: Using NvChad: Visual mode, text search and saving/quitting

questions.q: After Esc (to NORMAL), which combo enters Visual Block mode to select text?
In Visual mode, which keys copy (yank) and delete the selection?
options: y to copy, d to delete
c to copy, x to delete
p to copy, d to delete
questions.why: y yanks to the clipboard; d deletes the selection.

questions.q: How do you search for text?
options: Type / followed by the search term

questions.q: After a search, how do you jump to the next and previous match?
options: / + Enter for next, ? + Enter for previous
questions.why: / + Enter moves forward, ? + Enter moves back.

questions.q: To save the current file you use...
questions.why: :w writes the file with its current name.

questions.q: To save AND close the editor you use...
To save under a new name or location you run...
questions.why: :w followed by a path saves a copy there.
